error_signature: images not displaying in published version
title: Images not displaying after publishing app
symptom: Images appear correctly in the editor but fail to display in the published version of the app.
applies_when: Images are uploaded with special characters in the filename
Viewing the published version of the app
not_this_if: Images display correctly in the published version
root_cause: Images with special characters or accents in their filenames may not be processed correctly in the published version of the app, leading to display issues.
fix_steps: Rename the image file to remove any accents or special characters
Re-upload the renamed image to the app
Publish the app again and check if the image displays
agent_instruction: Rename the image to remove accents and re-upload it to the app.
